<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band05_chunk003.pdf#page=11 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band05 p120 -->

<!-- header: KLOSTER INDERSDORF -->

[[File:Band05_chunk003_p011_img001.jpg|thumb]]

[[File:Band05_chunk003_p011_img002.jpg|thumb|W<sub>7</sub> Priesterweihe des hl. Augustinus]]

[[File:Band05_chunk003_p011_img003.jpg|thumb|W<sub>2</sub> Priesterweihe des hl. Augustinus]]

[[File:Band05_chunk003_p011_img004.jpg|thumb|W<sub>10</sub> Disputation mit dem Manichäer Fortunatus]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band05 p121 -->
